title: Finnish Local Government 2004: Youth Affairs 1996
description: The survey focused on the scope, service provision, management, and development policies of youth affairs departments of Finnish municipalities. The respondents were municipal officials responsible for youth affairs. Similar surveys were carried out in 1999 and 2002. First, the respondents were asked how many employees there were in the youth affairs departments of their municipalities, and what their responsibilities were.
